title: 2-digit place value challenge
description: Practice breaking numbers apart into tens and ones.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which are the same as the number $23$? **

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: In the number $\purple{2}\green{3}$, there are $\purple{2}$ tens and $\green{3}$ ones.

$\purple{2}$ tens $+$ $\green{3}$ ones $=$ $\purple{2}\green{3}$

$\purple{10}$ $+$ $\purple{10}$ $+$ $\green{1}$ $+$ $\green{1}$ $+$ $\green{1}$ $= \purple{2}\green{3}$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which are the same as the number $68$?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: In the number $\purple{6}\green{8}$, there are $\purple{6}$ tens and $\green{8}$ ones.

$\purple{6}$ tens $+$ $\green{8}$ ones $=$ $\purple{6}\green{8}$

$\purple{10} + \purple{10} + \purple{10}+ \purple{10}+ \purple{10}+ \purple{10}+ \green{8} = \purple{6}\green{8}$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which are the same as the number $53$?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: In the number $\purple{5}\green{3}$, there are $\purple{5}$ tens and $\green{3}$ ones.

$\purple{5}$ tens $+$ $\green{3}$ ones $=$ $\purple{5}\green{3}$

$\purple{10}$ $+$ $\purple{10}$ $+$ $\purple{10}$ $+$ $\purple{10}$ $+$ $\purple{10}$ $+$ $\green{3}$ $ = \purple{5}\green{3}$

$\green{53}$ ones $ = \purple{5}\green{3}$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which are the same as the number $71$? **

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: In the number $\purple{7}\green{1}$, there are $\purple{7}$ tens and $\green{1}$ one.

$\purple{7}$ tens $+$ $\green{1}$ one $=\purple{7}\green{1}$

$\purple{10}$ $+$ $\purple{10}$ $+$ $\purple{10}$ $+$ $\purple{10}$ $+$$\purple{10}$ $+$$\purple{10}$   $+$$\purple{10}$ $+$ $\green{1}$ $=\purple{7}\green{1}$

$\purple{7}$ tens $+$ $\green{1}$ $=\purple{7}\green{1}$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which are the same as the number $97$?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: In the number $\purple{9}\green{7}$, there are $\purple{9}$ tens and $\green{7}$ ones.

$\purple{9}$ tens $+$ $\green{7}$ ones $=$ $\purple{9}\green{7}$

$\purple{10}$ $+$  $\purple{10}$ $+$ $\purple{10}$ $+$ $\purple{10}$ $+$ $\purple{10}$ $+$ $\purple{10}$ $+$ $\purple{10}$ $+$ $\purple{10}$ $+$ $\purple{10}$ $+$ $\green{7}$ $= \purple{9}\green{7}$

$\green{97}$ ones $=  \purple{9}\green{7}$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which are the same as the number $46$?**

$\purple{4}$ tens $+$ $\green{6}$ ones $=$ $\purple{4}\green{6}$

$\purple{10}$ $+$ $\purple{10}$ $+$ $\purple{10}$ $+$ $\purple{10}$ $+$ $\green{6}$ $= \purple{4}\green{6}$

$\green{46}$ ones $=  \purple{4}\green{6}$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which are the same as the number $85$?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: In the number $\purple{8}\green{5}$, there are $\purple{8}$ tens and $\green{5}$ ones.

$\purple{8}$ tens $+$ $\green{5}$ ones $=$ $\purple{8}\green{5}$

$\purple{10} + \purple{10} + \purple{10} + \purple{10} + \purple{10} + \purple{10} + \purple{10} + \purple{10} + \green{5} = \purple{8}\green{5}$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which are the same as the number $14$? **

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: In the number $\purple{1}\green{4}$, there are $\purple{1}$ ten and $\green{4}$ ones.

$\purple{1}$ ten $+$ $\green{4}$ ones $=$ $\purple{1}\green{4}$

$\purple{10}$ $+$ $\green{1}$$+$ $\green{1}$$+$ $\green{1}$$+$ $\green{1}$ $= \purple{1}\green{4}$

$\purple{1}$ ten $+$ $\green{1}$$+$ $\green{1}$$+$ $\green{1}$$+$ $\green{1}$ $= \purple{1}\green{4}$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which are the same as the number $51$? **

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: In the number $\purple{5}\green{1}$, there are $\purple{5}$ tens and $\green{1}$ one.

$\purple{5}$ tens $+$ $\green{1}$ one $=$ $\purple{5}\green{1}$

$\purple{10}$ $+$ $\purple{10}$ $+$ $\purple{10}$ $+$$\purple{10}$ $+$$\purple{10}$ $+$$\green{1}$ $= \purple{5}\green{1}$

**Which are the same as the number $40$?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: In the number $\purple{4}\green{0}$, there are $\purple{4}$ tens and $\green{0}$ ones.

$\purple{4}$ tens $+$ $\green{0}$ ones $=$ $\purple{4}\green{0}$

$\purple{10}$ $+$ $\purple{10}$ $+$ $\purple{10}$ $+$ $\purple{10}$ $+$ $\green{0}$ $ = \purple{4}\green{0}$

$\green{40}$ ones $ = \purple{4}\green{0}$

$\purple{3}$ tens $+$ $\green{9}$ ones $=$ $\purple{3}\green{9}$

$\purple{10}$ $+$ $\purple{10}$ $+$ $\purple{10}$ $+$ $\green{9}$ $= \purple{3}\green{9}$

$\green{39}$ ones $=  \purple{3}\green{9}$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which are the same as the number $75$? **

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: In the number $\purple{7}\green{5}$, there are $\purple{7}$ tens and $\green{5}$ ones.

$\purple{7}$ tens $+$ $\green{5}$ ones $=$ $\purple{7}\green{5}$

$\purple{10}$ $+$ $\purple{10}$ $+$ $\purple{10}$ $+$ $\purple{10}$ $+$ $\purple{10}$ $+$ $\purple{10}$ $+$ $\purple{10}$ $+$ $\green{1}$ $+$ $\green{1}$$+$ $\green{1}$$+$ $\green{1}$$+$ $\green{1}$ $= \purple{7}\green{5}$

$\purple{7}$ tens $+$ $\green{1}$ $+$ $\green{1}$$+$ $\green{1}$$+$ $\green{1}$$+$ $\green{1}$ $= \purple{7}\green{5}$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which are the same as the number $26$?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: In the number $\purple{2}\green{6}$, there are $\purple{2}$ tens and $\green{6}$ ones.

$\purple{2}$ tens $+$ $\green{6}$ ones $=$ $\purple{2}\green{6}$

$\purple{10} + \purple{10} + \green{6} = \purple{2}\green{6}$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which are the same as the number $64$? **

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: In the number $\purple{6}\green{4}$, there are $\purple{6}$ tens and $\green{4}$ ones.

$\purple{6}$ tens $+$ $\green{4}$ ones $=\purple{6}\green{4}$

$\purple{10}$ $+$ $\purple{10}$ $+$ $\purple{10}$ $+$ $\purple{10}$ $+$$\purple{10}$ $+$$\purple{10}$  $+$ $\green{4}$ $=\purple{6}\green{4}$

$\purple{6}$ tens $+$ $\green{1}$ $+$ $\green{1}$$+$ $\green{1}$$+$ $\green{1}$ $=\purple{6}\green{4}$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which are the same as the number $82?$**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: In the number $\purple8\green2$, there are $\purple{8}$ tens and $\green{2}$ ones.

$\purple{8}$ tens $+$ $\green{2}$ ones $=$ $\purple{8}\green{2}$

$\purple{10}$ $+$ $\purple{10}$ $+$ $\purple{10}$$+$ $\purple{10}$$+$ $\purple{10}$$+$ $\purple{10}$$+$ $\purple{10}$$+$ $\purple{10}$ $+$ $\green{2}$ $= \purple{8}\green{2}$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which are the same as $64$?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
$\blue6\red4$ has $\blue{6}$ in the tens place.

$\blue6$ tens is the same as $\blue{10} + \blue{10} + \blue{10} + \blue{10} + \blue{10} + \blue{10}$.

$\blue6$ tens equals $\blue{60}$.

$\blue6\red4$ has $\red{4}$ in the ones place.

$\red{4}$ ones is the same as $\red{1} +  \red{1} + \red{1} + \red{1}$.
 
$\red{4}$ ones equals $\red4$.

$\blue6\red4 = \blue{60} + \red4$

$\blue6\red4 = \blue{10} + \blue{10} + \blue{10} +\blue{10} + \blue{10} + \blue{10} + \red4$

$\blue6\red4 = \blue{60} +\red 1 + \red1 + \red1 + \red1$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which are the same as $26$?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
$\blue2\red6$ has $\blue{2}$ in the tens place.

$\blue2$ tens is the same as $\blue{10} + \blue{10}$.

$\blue2$ tens equals $\blue{20}$.

$\blue2\red6$ has $\red{6}$ in the ones place.

$\red{6}$ ones is the same as $\red{1}+ \red1 + \red1+ \red1 + \red1 +   \red{1}$.

$\red{6}$ ones equals $\red6$.

$\blue2\red6 =  \blue{10} + \blue{10} + \red6$

$\blue2\red6 = \blue{10} +\blue{10} + \red1 + \red1+ \red1 + \red1+ \red1 + \red1$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which are the same as $42$?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
$\blue4\red2$ has $\blue{4}$ in the tens place.

$\blue4$ tens is the same as $\blue{10} + \blue{10} + \blue{10} + \blue{10}$.

$\blue4$ tens equals $\blue{40}$.

$\blue4\red2$ has $\red{2}$ in the ones place.

$\red{2}$ ones is the same as $\red{1} +   \red{1}$.
 
$\red{2}$ ones equals $\red2$.

$\blue4\red2 = \blue{40} + \red2$

$\blue4\red2 = \blue{10} + \blue{10} + \blue{10} + \blue{10} + \red1 + \red1$

$\blue4\red2 = \blue{40} + \red1 + \red1$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which are the same as $73$?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
$\blue7\red3$ has $\blue{7}$ in the tens place.

$\blue7$ tens is the same as $\blue{10} + \blue{10} +  \blue{10}  + \blue{10} + \blue{10} + \blue{10} + \blue{10}$.

$\blue7$ tens equals $\blue{70}$.

$\blue7\red3$ has $\red{3}$ in the ones place.

$\red{3}$ ones is the same as $\red1+ \red1 +   \red1$.

$\red{3}$ ones equals $\red{3}$.

$\blue7\red3 =  \blue{70} + \red3$

$\blue7\red3 =  \blue{70} + \red1 + \red1 + \red1$

$\blue7\red3 =  \blue{10} + \blue{10} +  \blue{10} + \blue{10} + \blue{10} + \blue{10} + \blue{10} + \red3$

$\blue7\red3 =  \blue{10} + \blue{10} +  \blue{10} + \blue{10} + \blue{10} + \blue{10} + \blue{10} + \red1 + \red1 + \red1$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which are the same as $51$?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
$\blue5\red1$ has $\blue{5}$ in the tens place.

$\blue5$ tens is the same as $\blue{10} + \blue{10} +  \blue{10} + \blue{10} +\blue{10}$.

$\blue5$ tens equals $\blue{50}$.

$\blue5\red1$ has $\red{1}$ in the ones place.

$\red{1}$ one equals $\red{1}$.

$\blue5\red1 =  \blue{50} + \red1$

$\blue5\red1 =  \blue{10} + \blue{10} +  \blue{10} + \blue{10} +\blue{10} + \red1$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which are the same as $30$?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
$\blue3\red0$ has $\blue{3}$ in the tens place.

$\blue3$ tens is the same as $\blue{10} + \blue{10} +\blue{10}$.

$\blue3$ tens equals $\blue{30}$.

$\blue3\red0$ has $\red{0}$ in the ones place.

$\red{0}$ ones equals $\red{0}$.
$\blue3\red0 =  \blue{10} + \blue{10} +\blue{10}$

assessment_items.question_content:
**What number is the same as $3$ tens $+$ $10$ ones?**

[[☃ input-number 1]]
hints: $\red{10}$ ones is the same as $\blue{1}$ ten.

$\blue3 \text{ tens} +\red{10} \text{ ones}=$

$\blue3 \text{ tens} + \blue1 \text{ ten} =$

$\blue4 \text{ tens}$

$\blue{4}$ tens  $=$

$\blue4 \text{ tens} +\red{0} \text{ ones}=$

$\blue{4}\red{0}$

assessment_items.question_content:
**What number is the same as $3$ tens $+$ $24$ ones?**

[[☃ input-number 1]]
hints:
$\blue3 \text{ tens}+\red{24} \text{ ones}=$

$\blue3 \text{ tens}+\red{20} \text{ ones}+\red4 \text{ ones}$
$\red{20}$ ones is the same as $\blue{2}$ tens.

$\blue3 \text{ tens}+\red{20} \text{ ones}+\red4\text{ ones}=$

$\blue3 \text{ tens}+\blue2 \text{ tens}+\red{4} \text{ ones}=$

$\blue5 \text{ tens}+\red{4} \text{ ones}$

$\blue{5}$ tens $+$ $\red{4}$ ones $=$

$\blue{5}\red{4}$

assessment_items.question_content:
**What number is the same as $1$ ten $+$ $18$ ones?**

[[☃ input-number 1]]
hints:
$\blue1 \text{ ten}+\red{18} \text{ ones}=$

$\blue1 \text{ ten}+\red{10} \text{ ones}+\red8\text{ ones}$
$\red{10}$ ones is the same as $\blue{1}$ ten.

$\blue1 \text{ ten}\,\ +\red{10} \text{ ones}+\red8\text{ ones}=$

$\blue1 \text{ ten}\,\ + \blue1 \text{ ten} +\red{8} \text{ ones}=$

$\blue2 \text{ tens}+ \red{8} \text{ ones}$

$\blue{2}$ tens $+$ $\red{8}$ ones $=$

$\blue{2}\red{8}$

assessment_items.question_content:
**What number is the same as $5$ tens $+$ $12$ ones?**

[[☃ input-number 1]]
hints:
$\blue5 \text{ tens}+\red{12} \text{ ones}=$

$\blue5 \text{ tens}+\red{10} \text{ ones}+\red2\text{ ones}$
$\red{10}$ ones is the same as $\blue{1}$ ten.

$\blue5 \text{ tens}+\red{10} \text{ ones}+\red2\text{ ones}=$

$\blue5 \text{ tens}+\blue1 \text{ ten}+\red{2} \text{ ones}=$

$\blue6 \text{ tens}+\red{2} \text{ ones}$

$\blue{6}$ tens $+$ $\red{2}$ ones $=$

$\blue{6}\red{2}$
